name: Google Cloud Translation API
description: The Google Cloud Translation API v2 lets applications integrate with Google Translate programmatically. Translate text between 100+ languages, detect the language of input text, and retrieve the list of supported languages.

capabilities.name: translations_translate_post
capabilities.description: Translate one or more text strings to a target language via POST request.

capabilities.name: translations_translate_get
capabilities.description: Translate text to a target language via GET request with query parameters.

capabilities.name: detections_detect_post
capabilities.description: Detect the language of one or more text strings via POST request.

capabilities.name: detections_detect_get
capabilities.description: Detect the language of text via GET request with query parameters.

capabilities.name: languages_list
capabilities.description: List all supported languages for translation, with optional localized names.
